title: Timeline Visual Layout Verification
objective: Verify the visual layout of transaction rows, including date placement, account labels, and system entry formatting.

steps.expected_result: Transactions are listed with full digital dates (DD/MM/YY) on the left

steps.step: Observe an Expense or Income transaction
steps.expected_result: Account name (e.g., 'Cash') is visible on the right, below the amount
Labels have no underscores and no redundant duplicate notes below the title
